nasb.text: He who oppresses the poor taunts his Maker, But he who is gracious to the needy honors Him.

esv.text: Whoever oppresses a poor man insults his Maker, but he who is generous to the needy honors him.

cnv.text: 欺壓貧寒的，就是辱罵造他的主； 恩待窮苦人的，就是尊敬造他的主。

ccb.text: 欺压穷人等于侮辱造物主， 怜悯贫弱就是尊敬造物主。

csbs.text: 欺压贫弱者的，就是辱骂造他的主； 恩待穷乏人的，就是荣耀主。
